name: 2×4 LED Backlit Panel Light 5CCT & 5WATT Selectable
description: The ZION LED USA 2×4 LED Backlit Panel Light offers a high-performance, Customisable lighting solution suitable for both commercial and residential environments. With selectable wattages (30W, 40W, 50W, 60W, 72W) and adjustable color temperatures (3000K–6500K), it delivers tailored illumination for any space. Its backlit design ensures uniform brightness without dark spots, while maximising energy efficiency. ZION LED USA 2×4 Backlit LED Panel is the smart choice for modern, adjustable lighting that combines reliability, energy savings, and seamless integration into a wide range of interiors.
short_desc: 2×4 LED Backlit Panel Light-Selectable Wattage 30W/40W/50W/60W/72W-Selectable CCT 3000K/3500K/4000K/5000K/6500K. Key Features: Selectable Wattage: 30W / 40W / 50W / 60W / 72W Adjustable CCT: 3000K / 3500K / 4000K / 5000K / 6500K Even Light Distribution: Backlit technology for consistent, glare-free illumination High Efficiency: Delivers high lumens per watt for reduced energy costs Simple Installation: Designed for standard drop ceiling grids; great for retrofits or new setups Ideal Applications: Offices & Conference Rooms Retail Stores & Showrooms Schools & Educational Facilities Hospitals & Healthcare Centers Residential Areas & Apartments Hotels & Restaurants
